claims.summary: Mirror, Dialogue, and Witness are distinct interaction modes and Witness renders state phenomenologically rather than only diagnostically.
Recent pressure risk and mode-packing score move together strongly while local control remains unapplied.
Semantic-edge and anchored continuity tests preserve dense felt texture under byte bounds.
Automatic porosity expansion or a Soft Witness local-control mode would change live controller behavior and requires operator-approved replay, canary, abort, and felt-response evidence.
